name: superpowers
description: Codex plugin wrapper for the Superpowers skills library: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques.

interface.shortDescription: Bring the Superpowers skills library into Codex as a standalone plugin snapshot
interface.longDescription: A Codex-focused wrapper around the Superpowers 5.0.6 release. The plugin now bundles the upstream skills, named-agent prompts, slash commands, and session-start hook files, while keeping the packaging centered on Codex-compatible surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Help me plan this feature before writing code.
Use systematic debugging to isolate this bug.
Execute this approved plan with tests first.
